rulings.Case Title: STEVEN HERBERT VS. KATHLEEN NEEDHAM et al

rulings.Case Title: ANDREW PILLET VS. STEPHEN H KENDRICK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answer To Interrogatories To Defendants-First Set
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 14, 2017, line 5. PLAINTIFF ANDREW PILLET's Motion To Compel Answer To Interrogatories To Defendants-First Set transferred to department 301 to be heard on March 21, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. with other pending discovery. The parties shall calendar all regularly noticed discovery motions in future for 9:00 a.m. in Department 301 and calendar all law and motion matters in this action for 9:30 a.m. in Department 501. Motion to Set Aside Default currently set for hearing in department 302 on April 3, 2017 shall be heard in department 501 on April 3, 2017 at 9:30 a.m. = (501/AJR)
